name: Next Level Golf
about: Next Level Golf is an indoor golf simulator facility located in Wichita Falls. The venue utilizes high-definition full swing simulators to provide golfers with an immersive experience, including detailed analytics on ball speed, launch angle, spin rate, club face angle, and swing path. While not a traditional country club, it offers a modern, inviting atmosphere suitable for both serious practice and casual play. The facility is open to the public with a pricing model that includes hourly rates and a monthly membership option, making it accessible for a range of golfers from beginners to serious players.
why_golfers_like_it: Comprehensive data analysis for shot improvement
Variety of world-famous virtual courses to play
Professional instruction available with simulator technology

food_and_drink.notes: On-site snacks available for purchase; outside food is allowed, no outside drinks. Delivery service recommended (Quickies Delivery).
On-site bar with cold beverages including beer, seltzers, bottled water, and sodas.

simulator_hardware.notes: Industry-leading simulators, precise measurements of ball speed, launch angle, spin rate, club face angle, and swing path.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue is equipped with all necessary golf clubs and equipment, but you are welcome to bring your own if you prefer.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: You can bring your own food, but outside drinks are not allowed. The venue has a variety of snacks available for purchase and a full bar with alcoholic and non-alcoholic beverages.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to complete 18 holes can vary based on the number of players and pace of play, but a typical session for a group of four can range from 2 to 3 hours.

faq.question: Is Next Level Golf kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the facility is suitable for children and offers Top-golf style games designed for all ages and skill levels, making it a great choice for family outings and birthday parties.
